mapper.select:
SELECT ent_id AS bookNo, title , author , publisher , pub_date AS pubDate , reg_date AS regDate , book_type AS dataType , state FROM book
WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bookNm}, '%')

SELECT ent_id AS bookNo , title , author , publisher , pub_date AS pubDate , reg_date AS regDate , book_type AS dataType , lib_No AS libNo , posi , clas , auth , vol , price , state FROM book
WHERE ent_id = #{bookNo}
